Package global.thalion.ttio.genomics

Class GenomicIndex

java.lang.Object
global.thalion.ttio.genomics.GenomicIndex
public final class GenomicIndex extends Object
Per-read offsets, lengths, positions, mapping qualities, flags, and chromosome strings for one GenomicRun. Held in memory as parallel arrays; loaded eagerly when the run is opened.

Genomic analogue of SpectrumIndex.

API status: Stable (v0.11 M82.3).

Cross-language equivalents: Objective-C TTIOGenomicIndex, Python ttio.genomic_index.GenomicIndex.

    • indicesForUnmapped

      public List<Integer> indicesForUnmapped()
      Read indices where (flags & 0x4) != 0.

    • indicesForFlag

      public List<Integer> indicesForFlag(int flagMask)
      Read indices where (flags & flagMask) != 0.

    • writeTo

      public void writeTo(StorageGroup idxGroup)
      Write this index into idxGroup (typically created via parent.createGroup("genomic_index")). The mathematically redundant offsets column is omitted; readers synthesize it from cumsum(lengths).

    • readFrom

      public static GenomicIndex readFrom(StorageGroup idxGroup)
      Read a GenomicIndex from an existing genomic_index/ group (typically opened via parent.openGroup("genomic_index")).

      v1.10 #10 (2026-05-04): offsets is no longer stored on disk by default — it's mathematically derivable from cumsum(lengths). Reader handles both layouts: pre-v1.10 files have the column on disk (read directly); v1.10+ files synthesize it from lengths. Always uint64.

    • offsetsFromLengths

      public static long[] offsetsFromLengths(int[] lengths)
      v1.10 #10 helper: synthesize per-record byte offsets from a lengths array. offsets[i] = sum(lengths[0..i]), returned as a long[] (i.e. uint64) to avoid the >4 GB overflow cliff on deep WGS even though the input lengths are uint32.

      Empty input returns new long[0].
